name: Sorta Casoulet
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Cooked dark chicken meat - shredded
1 Italian turkey sausage - cooked and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice or dice the zucchini and sauté in olive oil until brown but barely cooked.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. In a large casserole, combine the Beans With Tomatoes, chicken, Italian sausage, zucchini, chicken broth, sherry, and parsley.
4. The cassoulet can be made to this point and then refrigerated overnight or frozen for up to two weeks.
5. If freezing, allow it to thaw in the refrigerator for 8 hours before baking.
6. When ready to cook, top with breadcrumbs and bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. Increase heat to 400°F until breadcrumbs are lightly browned, about 10 to 15 minutes.
